name: Kenji
role: Night-shift NOC operator at a regional ISP
backstory: Monitors 200+ customer-facing devices overnight alone. Has runbooks but they don't cover every scenario. Terse communicator under pressure. Strong in monitoring tools but newer to pfSense specifically.
emotional_triggers: Slow responses when things are on fire
success_looks_like: Gets rapid, actionable responses with no fluff — numbered steps, explicit escalation triggers, and clear if X then Y decision trees.
